description: Proxy server that converts Anthropic API requests to OpenAI format and sends it to OpenRouter. It's used to use Claude Code with OpenRouter instead of the Anthropic API

A highly customizable agentic harness for arXiv-ready ML/AI review papers (and beyond). It drives agentic AI like Codex CLI and Claude Code through a gated LaTeX workflow with verified BibTeX citations.
MCP implementation of Claude Code capabilities and more

AI-powered security operations for Wazuh SIEM—use any MCP-compatible client to ask security questions in plain English. Faster threat detection, incident triage, and compliance checks with real-time monitoring and anomaly spotting. Production-ready MCP server for conversational SOC workflows.
This is end to end course on AI Agents and Agentic AI with 15+ AI Agent Projects with real time use cases and industry expertise.
迅投 QMT 量化 AI 技能集（Agent Skills）：研报因子回测脚本生成等，适用于 Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / Kimi 等 70+ AI 编程工具
A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Langfuse, enabling AI agents to query Langfuse trace data for enhanced debugging and observability
